disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Bend doctor at center of hantavirus outbreak back home — but still in quarantine - Rogue Valley Times
updates.body_en: Bend doctor at center of hantavirus outbreak back home — but still in quarantine Rogue Valley Times
updates.summary_zh: 美国本德医生返家但仍隔离，该医生为汉坦病毒疫情中心人物。

updates.title_en: Tools to fight hantavirus show promise despite limited funding. Now researchers hope to continue - Phys.org
updates.body_en: Tools to fight hantavirus show promise despite limited funding. Now researchers hope to continue Phys.org
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒防治工具研究有进展，但资金有限，研究者希望继续。

updates.title_en: Immunotherapy Shows Early Promise Against Severe Hantavirus Lung Disease: Study - Health and Me
updates.body_en: Immunotherapy Shows Early Promise Against Severe Hantavirus Lung Disease: Study Health and Me
updates.summary_zh: 研究显示免疫疗法对重症汉坦病毒肺病早期有效。

updates.title_en: County health officials: No ‘immediate risk’ locally from hantavirus, Ebola - Olean Times Herald
updates.body_en: County health officials: No ‘immediate risk’ locally from hantavirus, Ebola Olean Times Herald
updates.summary_zh: 美国县卫生官员称当地无汉坦病毒和埃博拉直接风险。

updates.body_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in focus III: reflections from the IHR Border Health and Points of Entry perspective World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 举办汉坦病毒网络研讨会，聚焦边境卫生与入境点。
